default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff and onboarding call between Arena and GrowthX (Marcel's company) to discuss goals, target audience, content strategy, and next steps for an SEO engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Main goal is to drive significant increase in organic traffic to fuel signups (target: 100 signups/day by end of 2023)](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Target audience is product managers, digital experience teams at media/publishing companies, sports teams, entertainment brands](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
  - [Currently lack structured content strategy/process - opportunity to build this out](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
  - [GrowthX will dig deeper into Arena's current SEO performance, CMS, existing research, and great content examples](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2962.0)

## Topics

### Goals & Metrics

  - [Target: 100 signups/day and $600k new ARR from self-service by end of 2023 (currently 4 signups/day)](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [Also aim to increase number of enterprise deals closed via organic traffic (historically 2 per quarter)](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Success looks like exponential growth in organic rankings/traffic over next 6-12 months](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)

### Target Audience

  - [Product managers, digital experience teams looking to increase engagement](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
  - [Companies: Media, publishers, sports, entertainment (e.g. ESPN, Reuters)](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2298.0)
  - [Have existing lists from ZoomInfo, Apollo of target accounts](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)

### Current Content Strategy

  - [No defined strategy/workflow currently - opportunity area](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
  - [Focused on fixing meta tags, titles for high-value keywords](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2778.0)
  - [Publish 1-2 new articles per week, update old content](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2778.0)
  - [Bottlenecks: new website launch, creating visual assets, prioritizing keywords](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=3224.0)

### Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to go deep on research/learning this week](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=3384.0)
  - [Arena to share: product demo, sales materials, existing keyword research, examples of great content](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=3543.0)
  - [Schedule deeper dive meetings with relevant stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=3632.0)
  - [Establish weekly sync cadence starting week 3](https://fathom.video/share/qEEy54yPwEk8hWyy8zXAMB1sxExi8Nzf?tab=summary&timestamp=3624.0)

action_items.description: Reach out to get access to Search Console
Schedule deeper dives to understand signup journey and conversion rate optimization
Share use cases, sales material and a Loom video overview of the product
Send recording of call, meeting notes and follow-up items
Schedule a follow-up call for next week
